title: Primus Labs
description: Primus (formerly PADO) is a trust, verification and privacy layer for crypto and AI-agent applications. Its core technologies are zkTLS and zkFHE. zkTLS extends the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol with zero-knowledge proofs, so data authenticity can be verified without revealing the data. zkFHE applies zero-knowledge proofs to computations on encrypted data, including when the computation is outsourced.
